_comment: item.effect Chinese (Simplified) translations — LLM-translated by Claude Opus 4.7, 2026-04-23. Source: effectKo. 24 Champions-new items (mega-stones + fairy-feather) missing from PokeAPI zh-hans.
fairy-feather: 在光线下会隐约发光的羽毛。携带后，妖精属性的招式威力会持续提高。
